date_notes: Statement made during the blockade period while Smith was a UCP leadership candidate, not yet Premier.
title_en: UCP leadership candidate publicly supports Coutts protesters
title_fr: Une candidate à la direction du PCU appuie publiquement les manifestants de Coutts
description_en: Then-UCP leadership candidate Danielle Smith publicly expressed support for the Coutts protesters. She later distanced herself from individuals charged in connection with the blockade. Both statements are documented here for a complete record.
verification_notes: Both halves sourced. R-023 (PressProgress) = original support statement, on-record video quote ('we want to see it win in Coutts'); note advocacy lean in UI. R-016 (Climenhaga/Rabble, opinion) = later distancing. Cite together; neither alone documents the full said-then-distanced record.
